entries.summary: Founded and built Atlas OS, an open-source dashboard toolkit — owning the design system, component library, and the docs site end to end.
Led the front-end rebuild of the Meridian Fitness app, unifying iOS and Android on a shared component library and shipping a WCAG-AA accessibility pass.
Designed and built the analytics dashboard for Northstar — a configurable charting system and a query builder used daily by enterprise customers.
